name: Order Express - Omaha M St & 24th St Check Cashing
description_short: Order Express operates 75+ branches across the U.S. offering check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and Bitcoin ATMs. Established in 1993, they serve 150K+ customers with no bank account required.
description_long:
Order Express is a financial services company founded in 1993 that has expanded to operate over 75 branches across the United States, including locations in Nebraska, Texas, California, Illinois, and 17 other states. The company positions itself as a community-focused alternative financial services provider, particularly serving unbanked and underbanked populations. With 150,000+ customers and 2.5+ million transactions annually, they have built a significant presence in underserved markets.

The company's core service offerings include instant check cashing (processing in under 5 minutes with no bank account required), international money transfers to 100+ countries (with specific promotions to Mexico), money orders, bill payment services (100,000+ billers), courier services for documents and packages, plane ticket booking, vehicle registration services in select states, and Bitcoin ATM kiosks operated through CoinFlip partnership. Their website emphasizes bilingual (English/Spanish) customer service across all locations.

Order Express distinguishes itself through extended operating hours (7 days per week), rapid transaction processing, elimination of banking requirements, and multi-service consolidation under one roof. Customer testimonials highlight satisfaction with money transfer services, check cashing speed, and staff helpfulness. The company claims 100% security and regulatory compliance, though specific regulatory oversight details are not detailed on the website.

As a check-cashing and alternative financial services provider, Order Express functions as a convenience service for those without traditional banking access rather than a credit or lending solution. Consumers should note that while check-cashing services are transparent, detailed fee structures are not published on the website. The company's business model relies on transaction volume rather than credit products, making it suitable for cash-based financial management but not for credit building or major borrowing needs.
pros: Instant check cashing processing in under 5 minutes with no bank account requirement
Bilingual English/Spanish staff at all 75+ locations serving diverse communities
Extended 7-day operating hours for customer convenience
Multi-service consolidation: check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, Bitcoin ATMs, and vehicle services under one roof
International money transfers to 100+ countries with specific competitive rates to Mexico
Access to Bitcoin ATM kiosks (CoinFlip) for cryptocurrency transactions with 24/7 support
Established 30+ year track record (since 1993) with 150,000+ active customers
cons: No detailed fee structure published on website; customers must visit locations or call for specific pricing on check cashing and transfers
Limited transparency on regulatory oversight and licensing details despite claims of 100% security
Services vary by location; not all branches offer all services (e.g., vehicle services available only in select states)
No mobile app or online check deposit options mentioned; transactions require in-person visits to physical locations
Bitcoin ATM services require use of third-party CoinFlip platform rather than proprietary system
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals without access to traditional bank accounts
Spanish-speaking consumers seeking bilingual financial services in their community
People needing rapid check conversion to cash without waiting periods or banking requirements
International remittance senders with regular transfers to Mexico or other countries
diagnosis: Order Express is best for unbanked consumers and Spanish-speaking customers who need fast, in-person check cashing and money transfer services without bank accounts. The main caveat is that this is purely a cash transaction and convenience service provider—it does not offer credit products, lending, or services for building credit, and all transactions require visiting a physical location.
services: Instant check cashing (no bank account required, under 5 minutes)
Domestic and international money order services
Bill payment (100,000+ national and international billers)
Courier services with tracking and guaranteed delivery
Vehicle services (registration, plates, permits, fine payment in select states)
Bitcoin ATM kiosks via CoinFlip partnership
